73481961.title: Gorton and Denton
73481961.extract:
Gorton and Denton is a constituency in Greater Manchester represented in the House of Commons of the UK Parliament, which came into being for the 2024 general election, following the 2023 review of Westminster constituencies. 
The current Member of Parliament (MP) is Hannah Spencer of the Green Party, who won a by-election on 26 February 2026 to fill the seat of Andrew Gwynne, who resigned citing ill health in early-2026.
